things.description: World's most photographed beach with granite boulders and crystal water

things.name: Aldabra Atoll
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage world's second largest coral atoll with giant Aldabra tortoises

things.description: Local market with coco de mer, vanilla, cinnamon, fresh fish and fresh coconut

things.description: Mahe's main beach with watersports, snorkelling and a Saturday night market

things.description: Giant Aldabra tortoise skeleton and the natural history of the Seychelles islands

things.name: Morne Seychellois National Park
things.description: Hiking through cinnamon and takamaka forest on the highest peak in the Seychelles

things.name: Island Hopping (Praslin, La Digue)
things.description: Ferry to Praslin for the Vallee de Mai, then bicycle around car-free La Digue

things.name: Hindu Temple (Sri Navasakthi Vinayagar)
things.description: Colourful South Indian Hindu temple in the heart of Victoria

things.name: Creole Festival (October)
things.description: Festival Kreol celebrating Seychellois Creole music, food and cultural traditions
